construct_threats: Grid filling is procedural; students may copy arithmetic patterns without recounting cards.
evidence_limitations: Row-level scoring aggregates four cells; cell-level evidence is not separately scored.
Reference counts computed dynamically from data/prodabi_food_cards.csv (N=11); no fixed threshold answer key.
Partial row credit (0.5) when notation and arithmetic are valid but classification counts mismatch the dataset.

cross_worksheet_dependencies.reason: Students apply threshold search insights on the same food-card set.
